selection.selection_note: Judged only owned repair batch 35 against full standard_source_table metadata, semantic_brief, S-57/OpenCPN structure, S-101/OpenCPN provider witnesses, Chart No.1 parity crops where available, and actual batch-35 Helm candidate SVG/renders on branch.

verdicts.expected: PRDINS02 is mine, quarry: a brown crossed mine/quarry tools glyph from the S-101/OpenCPN witnesses, not a target, circle, buoy, beacon, or generic hazard mark.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct PRDARE/mine-quarry class, brown load-bearing colour, crossed tools silhouette, and no dangerous target or navigation-aid substitution. Visual scale is Helm-styled but preserves the source witnesses; no final approval implied.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a brown crossed-tool mine/quarry mark with two pick/hammer-like heads and no crossed-circle target regression.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.
source_refs_used: s57_structure:PRDARE point; SY(PRDINS02); OpenCPN definition PRDINS02, colour ref WLANDFKCHBRN, brown mine/quarry crossed-tool symbol.

verdicts.expected: PSSARE01 is the PSSA area symbol/pattern: magenta PSSA text, not a dashed square placeholder or generic area hatch.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct PSSA text label, magenta area-symbol family, and no placeholder enclosure. Candidate is filled/bolder than the S-101 outline text but preserves the label/text semantics and remains acceptable Helm styling; no final approval implied.
verdicts.observed: Candidate renders bold magenta PSSA text across day/dusk/night, replacing the prior dashed-square placeholder.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.
source_refs_used: s57_structure:RESARE area; SY(PSSARE01);LC(ESSARE01); S-101 witness is the centred magenta PSSA text area symbol.

verdicts.expected: QUARRY01 is quarry: compact brown crossed quarry tools/hash geometry inside the reference circular witness, not an hourglass or top/bottom-bar frame.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct quarry class, brown/land colour family, circular witness, and crossed tool shape. Visual parity is acceptable in Helm style; no final approval implied.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a brown circular quarry witness containing crossed tool geometry and no hourglass top/bottom bars.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.
source_refs_used: s57_structure:PRDARE area / $CSYMB point; SY(QUARRY01);LS(DASH,1,LANDF); OpenCPN definition QUARRY01, colour ref ALANDF.

verdicts.expected: SNDWAV02 must be the grey repeating sand-wave reference pattern: short angular/stepped wavelets at reference scale, not a generic swell or wave icon.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic class is closer than the previous brown two-line wave motif, but visual parity still fails: the load-bearing sand-wave pattern and scale are not preserved closely enough, and the smooth swell-like curve risks confusion with generic wave/swell artwork. No final approval implied.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is grey and no longer brown, but it is still a large smooth continuous sinusoidal wave stroke rather than the short angular/stepped sand-wave wavelets shown by S-101/OpenCPN.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw SNDWAV02 as short grey angular/stepped sand-wave wavelets at the S-101/OpenCPN reference scale; remove the large smooth swell-like wave curve.
source_refs_used: s57_structure:SNDWAV line/point; LS(DASH,2,CHGRD);SY(SNDWAV02); OpenCPN definition SNDWAV02, colour ref ACHGRD.

verdicts.expected: SPRING02 is a spring/water-source glyph, not a diamond marker or buoy/beacon symbol.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct spring class, grey reference colour family, and water-source/spring silhouette. It is cleaner/larger than the tiny OpenCPN witness but does not introduce dangerous chart-symbol confusion; no final approval implied.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a small grey spring/water-source mark with stem, baseline, and spring arcs; the prior diamond/ring marker is gone.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.
source_refs_used: s57_structure:SPRING point; SY(SPRING02); OpenCPN definition SPRING02, colour ref ECHGRD.

verdicts.expected: SWPARE51 is swept area: a simple grey U/bracket witness, with no magenta rounded enclosure and no invented internal dash.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct swept-area class, grey bracket geometry, and reference colour family. Visual parity is acceptable in Helm style; no final approval implied.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a simple grey U-shaped bracket across day/dusk/night with no internal dash or magenta enclosure.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.
source_refs_used: s57_structure:SWPARE area; SY(SWPARE51);TE('swept to %5.1lf','DRVAL1',...); LS(DASH,1,CHGRD) or LC(NAVARE51); OpenCPN definition SWPARE51, colour ref ACHGRF.

verdicts.expected: TIDCUR01 is predicted tidal stream/current direction: an orange dashed/discrete arrow stack with separated chevrons and broken shaft/tail, visually distinct from the solid TIDCUR02 actual-current arrow.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate fails on the predicted-vs-actual distinction. The candidate removed the old diamond marker, but it does not preserve the dashed/discrete predicted-current shaft from OpenCPN/S-101 and risks dangerous confusion with the actual-current arrow. No final approval implied.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is orange and directional, but it uses a continuous solid center shaft with chevrons, making it nearly the same glyph class as TIDCUR02 except without the small TIDCUR02 dot.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw TIDCUR01 as the predicted-current orange dashed arrow stack: keep separate chevrons, break the shaft into dashed/discrete segments including the lower tail, and keep it visually distinct from solid TIDCUR02 actual-current arrow.
source_refs_used: s57_structure:tidcur point / $CSYMB; SY(TIDCUR01,ORIENT); often paired with SY(TIDCUR03) and TX('P',...); OpenCPN definition TIDCUR01, colour ref ANINFO.

verdicts.expected: TIDCUR02 is actual tidal stream/current direction: orange solid current-direction arrow with stem/chevrons; S-101 includes a tiny upper-right zero-length stroke/dot witness.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct actual-current class, orange NINFO colour family, upward directional arrow orientation, solid shaft, and small dot witness. It is Helm-scaled but not dangerously confused with a diamond, box, buoy, or area symbol; no final approval implied.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is an orange solid current-direction arrow with stem/chevrons and a small upper-right dot matching the S-101/OpenCPN witness detail.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.
source_refs_used: s57_structure:tidcur point / $CSYMB; SY(TIDCUR02,ORIENT); often paired with SY(TIDCUR03) and TX('A',...); OpenCPN definition TIDCUR02, colour ref fNINFO.

verdicts.expected: TIDCUR03 is the orange current-strength box outline, not a diamond point marker.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct current-strength box class, orange colour family, rectangular outline, and no point-diamond substitution. Visual scale/stroke are acceptable Helm styling; no final approval implied.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is an orange rectangular box outline across day/dusk/night; the prior diamond marker is gone.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.
source_refs_used: s57_structure:tidcur point / $CSYMB; SY(TIDCUR03); paired with TIDCUR01/TIDCUR02 and current-strength text; OpenCPN definition TIDCUR03, colour ref fNINFO.

verdicts.expected: TIDEHT01 is the grey tide-height wave/level glyph: horizontal level line with a wave crossing, not a diamond marker.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct tide-height information class, grey colour family, and wave/level geometry. Candidate is cleaner and larger than the raster witness but preserves the source silhouette; no final approval implied.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a grey horizontal water-level line with a wave crossing above/below the line; the prior diamond/ring marker is gone.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.
source_refs_used: s57_structure:T_HMON/T_NHMN/T_TIMS point/area; SY(TIDEHT01), sometimes LS(DASH,1,CHGRD) or LC(TIDINF51); OpenCPN definition TIDEHT01, colour ref ACHGRD.

verdicts.expected: TIDSTR01 is an open grey tidal-stream-table diamond marker at reference scale, not a filled diamond/ring marker.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes: correct tidal-stream-table class, open diamond shape, grey colour family, and no fill/ring substitution. Visual scale/stroke are acceptable Helm styling; no final approval implied.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is an open grey diamond outline across day/dusk/night; the prior filled diamond and center ring are gone.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.
source_refs_used: s57_structure:TS_PAD/TS_PNH/TS_PRH/TS_TIS point/area; SY(TIDSTR01), sometimes LS(DASH,1,CHGRD) or LC(TIDINF51); OpenCPN definition TIDSTR01, colour ref ACHGRD.
